hook: A therapy platform brings in around a billion dollars a year. For providing a platform.
vo: BetterHelp generates around a billion dollars a year in revenue — for providing a platform.
The therapists do the actual work.
Faresay is free to start. No commission on sessions. The only per-session cost is standard card processing — and Faresay keeps none of it.
You set your prices. You keep your clients. You keep your data.
onscreen_text: Your clients. Your rates. Your data.
cta: The work is the therapist's. The money should follow the work.
broll_notes: Close-up of hands typing a session note on a phone, then a simple clean dashboard showing a payment going directly to a bank account — no deductions visible. Muted, natural lighting. No faces.
